creator: waldeck@gmx.de
text:
I tried to use my UMTS card (Option N.V. Fusion UMTS Quad-GPRS) with FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE. The card is working with XP and Debian GNU/Linux.

I found two patches at http://www.rinta-aho.org/docs/option3g/option.html
for FreeBSD 6.0-CURRENT.

I adapted the patches for FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE.
